title: SEC Commemoration Of Workers Day - FinancialEDGE
description: Acting Director General Securities and Exchange Commission, Dr. Emomotimi Agama flacked by members of Association of Civil Servants of Nigeria SEC Branch, during the commemoration of Workers Day in Abuja Wednesday.
html: Acting Director General Securities and Exchange Commission, Dr. Emomotimi Agama flacked by members of Association of Civil Servants of Nigeria SEC Branch, during the commemoration of Workers Day in Abuja Wednesday.
